title: Formal Workflow Substrate Follow Through
goal: Resolve #327 by adding the smallest package-backed branch-posture signal that makes default-branch commit or push risk visible before implementation closeout.
Keep the result in the formal workflow/config/reporting substrate rather than adding another prose-only instruction.
non_goals: Do not build a heavyweight git policy engine.
Do not forbid direct default-branch work when the user has explicitly kept the agent on that branch.

intent.outcome: Package compact startup/report surfaces distinguish staying on the current branch from being safe to implement, commit, and push on the default branch.
intent.constraints: Use current repo branch state; preserve user authority over branch switching; keep the signal advisory unless repo policy says otherwise.
intent.latitude: Choose the smallest derived report/preflight/config field and validation coverage needed to make the risk visible.
intent.escalation: Stop if the change would require enforcing a branching policy instead of surfacing posture and risk.

execution.next_step: Archive this plan, close #327, and continue to local-only-memory-continuity.
execution.proof: Focused tests plus live package preflight/report show current branch, default-branch status, and commit/push risk.

touched: packages/workspace or root workspace reporting source
invariants: No hidden git mutation in read-only report/preflight surfaces.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Branch posture becomes a first-class compact workflow signal.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Dogfooding showed `promote-to-plan` does not understand compact TOML active items; filed #330 and routed it to the graceful-partial-compliance lane.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: preflight and report now expose `branch_workflow_posture` with current branch, default branch, on-default status, advisory risk, and branch-authority guidance

intent_interpretation.literal request: execute all planned work lane by lane and dogfood the package
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: complete the second roadmap lane's concrete #327 follow-up before moving on
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: surface current/default branch posture and advisory risk in compact package outputs
intent_interpretation.review guidance: reject work that only adds prose reminders or silently changes branch behavior

execution_bounds.allowed paths: workspace reporting/preflight source and tests; package docs only if output contract changes; active planning state and this execplan
execution_bounds.required validation commands: focused pytest for changed package; uv run agentic-workspace preflight --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; git diff --check
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: stop before broad CLI restructuring or branch policy enforcement

stop_conditions.stop when: the branch posture signal is shipped, dogfooded, committed, pushed, and #327 is closed or a follow-up is opened for any residual
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: default-branch policy would require a user decision instead of package-derived reporting
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: work expands into full workflow engine design
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: live compact outputs still hide default-branch risk

context_budget.live working set: #327, #278, preflight/report implementation, active execplan, package tests
context_budget.recoverable later: full issue history, old workflow docs
context_budget.externalize before shift: update this execplan execution_run and immediate_next_action
context_budget.pre-work config pull: uv run agentic-workspace preflight/report/ownership were run before promotion
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: not required; task is workflow/reporting substrate and current planning context is sufficient
context_budget.tiny resumability note: add current/default branch posture to compact workflow outputs without changing branch switching behavior
context_budget.context-shift triggers: package report implementation is larger than expected or tests reveal hidden branch mutation

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: make default-branch commit/push risk visible through the package
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: stay on current branch; preserve user authority over branch switching; keep read-only outputs read-only
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: exact output field names and whether preflight, report, or both expose the signal
delegated_judgment.escalate when: risk handling would become enforcement or require a branch switch

immediate_next_action: Archive this completed plan with cleanup.
invariants: Current branch posture is advisory and explicit.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Default-branch risk is a workflow posture signal, not permission to switch branches.
open_questions_to_close: Which compact output should carry branch posture: preflight, report, or both?
completion_criteria: Compact package output includes current branch and default-branch risk when applicable.
Tests cover default-branch and non-default-branch posture.
Live dogfood output on this repo exposes that current branch is master/default before commit/push.

execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q -k "branch_posture or default_branch_commit_risk or preflight_surfaces_non_default_branch_posture or report_real_init_summarizes_combined_workspace_state or preflight_command_full_returns_bundled_takeover_context"; uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace/cli.py src/agentic_workspace/workspace_output.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q -k "report or preflight"; uv run pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; git diff --check; uv run agentic-workspace preflight --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: Default-branch posture is now visible before commit/push; #330 owns the separate compact-TOML promote-to-plan helper gap.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; branch switching behavior was not changed
finished_run_review.intent served: yes; compact outputs now surface default-branch commit risk
finished_run_review.config compliance: preflight/report/ownership/summary were used before and during implementation
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; the signal is advisory and preserves user branch authority
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: #330 filed for promote-to-plan compact TOML support

proof_report.validation proof: focused report/preflight tests, contract tooling check, maintainer-surface check, planning-surface check, live preflight/report/summary dogfood
proof_report.proof achieved now: workspace preflight and report expose `branch_workflow_posture` and report this repo as `master` on default branch with `default-branch-commit-risk`
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: src/agentic_workspace/cli.py branch posture projection, report contract/schema updates, workspace text rendering, and tests in tests/test_workspace_cli.py

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Surface default-branch commit risk before implementation or push.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Live package output now distinguishes current branch, default branch, and default-branch risk without switching branches.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make weaker agents safer and bounded execution cheaper to start, continue, review, and finish.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Expose one compact, actionable posture signal instead of adding another prose rule.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does the workflow substrate now prevent the branch-risk ambiguity that caused #327?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: the requested branch-risk signal is in compact package outputs and dogfooded on the current default branch
closure_check.evidence carried forward: active execplan, branch_workflow_posture output, tests, and #330
closure_check.reopen trigger: compact output hides default-branch posture during future implementation

execution_summary.outcome delivered: branch_workflow_posture is exposed through preflight and report, including default-branch commit risk
execution_summary.validation confirmed: focused tests, contract tooling, maintainer surfaces, planning surfaces, diff check, and live dogfood passed
execution_summary.follow-on routed to: #330 and graceful-partial-compliance for promote-to-plan compact TOML support
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): report contract/schema and compact package output

drift_log: 2026-04-26: Promoted the second roadmap lane for #327 and noted promote-to-plan compact-TOML friction.
